title: Isn't the future of AI trading fully personalized?
author: Fine-Perspective-438
selftext:
https://preview.redd.it/kyc4kku5y5tg1.png?width=1920&format=png&auto=webp&s=abe21d8da909fdcaed870989c541e1d80f272057

There are many great AI trading tools and platforms out there. This isn't about which one is better. It's about what works for you.

But one thing has always bothered me. Brokers charge fees, gate data behind paywalls, and lock you into their ecosystem. As a user who already pays commissions, starting on an uneven playing field never felt right.

So I built something different. A desktop trading IDE called SandClaw that turns brokers into plugins. One app, any broker. If a broker offers an API, it connects through that. If it doesn't, it uses CDP (Chrome DevTools Protocol) to interact with the broker's web interface directly, including real-time data and WebSocket interception.



Here's what it does:

. Plugin system connecting 15+ brokers worldwide (stocks, crypto, ETFs, futures, prediction markets)

. AI chatbot that analyzes markets, executes trades, and remembers your conversations through multi-layer RAG

. Chart pattern scanner that finds matching symbols across entire markets, then analyzes news before entry

. Autopilot mode with paper trading graduation. The AI learns from wins and losses, then trades your real account autonomously after passing minimum conditions

. Voice chat, Telegram/Slack integration, web search and news crawling

. REST API and WebSocket modes for tick-level fast trading

The connected AI grows with you. The more you talk to it, the more it adapts to your trading style.



"Last time this approach failed. Are you sure you want to proceed?"

"Yes, let's go with the method that worked before."

This is what multi-layer RAG enables. A program that becomes yours over time.



The app runs entirely on your PC. No server, no deposits, no withdrawals, no fees. Your data and memories stay on your machine. All funds remain safely in your broker's account. Completely free.

There's a lot more under the hood that I can't cover in one post. CDP browser automation, AI-powered Python coding and editing in terminal, Hive page with 9,000+ shared skills, and more. Finding the hidden features is part of the fun.

I also uploaded a demo scanner on Hugging Face where you can try scanning 700+ crypto pairs with custom strategy code.

Demo: [https://huggingface.co/spaces/JANG-100/sandclaw-strategy-scanner](https://huggingface.co/spaces/JANG-100/sandclaw-strategy-scanner)

Download: [https://github.com/kokogo100/sandclaw-releases](https://github.com/kokogo100/sandclaw-releases)

comments.author: HappyThrasher99
comments.body: This is why we need to bring in a license for being able to develop. Theres more of this slop churned out daily than there are people on earth.

replies.author: Fine-Perspective-438
replies.body: You have been caught lying. Please bring a different ID.
